# 🎓 College Enquiry AI Chatbot

**An Intelligent AI-Powered Chatbot for College Students and Parents**

![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?style=for-the-badge&logo=python&logoColor=white)
![Streamlit](https://img.shields.io/badge/Streamlit-FF4B4B?style=for-the-badge&logo=streamlit&logoColor=white)
![Scikit-learn](https://img.shields.io/badge/scikit--learn-FF9F1C?style=for-the-badge&logo=scikit-learn&logoColor=white)

---

## 📋 Problem Statement

Students and parents waste a lot of time waiting for information regarding **admissions, fees, courses, placements, hostel facilities**, etc. Traditional methods are slow and not available 24/7.

## 🎯 Project Objective

To develop a **complete end-to-end Machine Learning Chatbot** that understands natural language queries and gives instant, accurate responses.

## 📊 Dataset Information

- **Dataset**: College Chatbot Dataset (JSON Format)
- **Source**: Open GitHub / Kaggle style dataset
- **File**: `data/intents.json`
- **Total Intents**: 30+
- **Total Patterns**: 300+

## 🛠 Technologies Used

- **Language**: Python
- **ML Libraries**: Scikit-learn, TF-IDF Vectorizer
- **Models**: Logistic Regression (Best), Random Forest, XGBoost
- **Frontend**: Streamlit
- **Model Saving**: Joblib
- **Visualization**: Matplotlib, Seaborn

## 📈 Model Performance

- **Best Model**: Optimized Logistic Regression
- **Final Accuracy**: **> 95%** (Achieved)
- **Evaluation Metrics**: Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1-Score

## 🚀 Installation & Usage

### Step 1: Clone / Download Project
```bash
git clone https://github.com/mallahemanjali/college-enquiry-chatbot.git
cd college-enquiry-chatbot
